enqueue(E) - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.queue.ArrayBasedQueue
The code for this method is based on the mergesort algorithm on page 242 in the course textbook "Data Structures and Algorithms" by Goodrich, Tamassia, Goldwasser.
enqueue(E) - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.queue.Queue
Adds a new element to the back of the queue
entrySet() - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.map.Map
Returns an Iterable collection of all of the entries stored within the map
entrySet() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.map.SearchTableMap
adds the entries to the list
entrySet() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.map.SkipListMap
jumps to the bottom of the lst before we can add the values
entrySet() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.map.UnorderedLinkedMap
adds entries to an instance of our EntryCollection class
equals(Object) - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.data.Student
checks if two student objects are equal
